mapper.sql: id, service_id, name, description, endpoint, service_type, status, max_qps, health_check_url, documentation, nacos_service_id, version_no, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_services (service_id, name, description, endpoint, service_type, status, max_qps, health_check_url, documentation, nacos_service_id) VALUES (#{serviceId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{endpoint}, #{serviceType}, #{status}, #{maxQps}, #{healthCheckUrl}, #{documentation}, #{nacosServiceId})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_services SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, service_type = #{serviceType}, status = #{status}, max_qps = #{maxQps}, health_check_url = #{healthCheckUrl}, documentation = #{documentation}, nacos_service_id = #{nacosServiceId}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_services SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_services WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_services WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_services WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_services WHERE nacos_service_id = #{nacosServiceId} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_services WHERE deleted = b'0'
